Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}This is that one place that claims to "cleanse your soul" with healing stones and stuff, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}We can drop in, I guess... I mean, we already came all the way here, so might as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}Sure, I'll go in, I guess. They "cleanse your soul" with healing stones or something, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}We already came all the way here, after all. Not like I have any reason to say no.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1098 0 0}Huh? This place again? You must really like it here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}I don't mind stopping by. Besides... It means I can finally get a moment to rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}...Wow, I totally just passed out. You know, it's kind of a weird feeling, considering time's not really moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}I guess I was just that exhausted. So, um... thanks for inviting me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}...Wow, I completely passed out. Just like last time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}You know, he brought me here before. I don't remember much from back then, though—since I was asleep the whole time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}Anyway, I don't know if my soul is actually getting "cleansed" or whatever, but... thanks for inviting me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}No idea if it actually "cleansed my soul," though, since I was passed out the whole time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1042 0 0}Well, thanks for inviting me. See you around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost nighttime... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
